description.value: Aura minor illusion; CL 3rd; Slot shoulders; Price 11,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Designed to meet the dual needs of the elite — glamour and subtlety — the cloak of flash and shadow is a magic reversible cloak. When worn one way, the cloak shimmers with heavy gold and silver embroidery against richly colored silk, and grants you a +2 enhancement bonus to Charisma. When worn inside-out, the matte-black lining seems to absorb light, cloaking you in shadow and giving you a +2 competence bonus on Stealth checks. In this configuration you can cast blur three times per day. Reversing the cloak’s position is a standard action and requires at least one free hand. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, blur, eagle’s splendor; Cost 5,500 gp
